title: Kazakhstan Individual Income Tax Declaration — Schedule 220.03 (Treaty-Exempt Income)
description: The Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan's "Форма 220.03 — Доход, подлежащий освобождению от налогообложения в соответствии с международными договорами" (Form 220.03, income exempt from taxation under international treaties), Appendix 3 to the Individual Income Tax Declaration (Form 220.00, kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration, GOV-3477). Filed with the State Revenue Committee (Комитет государственных доходов, KGD) as an attachment to Form 220.00 whenever the taxpayer claims income exempt from Kazakhstan tax under a bilateral or multilateral international tax treaty. Approved as Appendix 11 to Order of the Minister of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 695 of 12 November 2025, published in full, unauthenticated, on the Ministry of Justice's own legal-information system, ИПС «Әділет». This v1.0.0 models Form 220.03 in full: the taxpayer-identification header, a single printed grand-total row, and 16 individual treaty-entry rows, each capturing the international treaty's type code, name, the treaty counterparty country's code, and the amount of income exempted under that treaty. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan or the State Revenue Committee.

authority.name: Комитет государственных доходов Министерства финансов Республики Казахстан (State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan)

source.documentRef: Приложение 11 к приказу Министра финансов Республики Казахстан от 12 ноября 2025 года № 695 — форма 220.03

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3544, deepening Kazakhstan's Taxes vertical by authoring the third of the ten disclosed companion schedules to Form 220.00 (Form 220.03, treaty-exempt income), the schedule the GOV-3506 cycle's own boundary check for Form 220.02 already located at image 178 of the same specimen. Independently re-fetched this cycle: https://adilet.zan.kz/rus/docs/V2500037390 (HTTP 200 via curl -k; the TLS-chain-missing-intermediate quirk already documented for this domain in the GOV-3459/GOV-3477/GOV-3484/GOV-3506 cycles is a server misconfiguration, not a real access gate). Form 220.03 itself is embedded as a single scanned page image, /files/1576/49/178.jpg, independently re-fetched (curl -k, HTTP 200) and read visually at native and zoomed (3x-6x, via the canvas npm package) resolution. Boundary-confirmed at both ends: the image's own header prints "форма 220.03 стр.01" directly (not inferred), and the next image, 179.jpg, was fetched and confirmed to already be Form 220.04 page 1 ("ДОХОДЫ ИЗ ИНОСТРАННЫХ ИСТОЧНИКОВ..."), confirming Form 220.03 is exactly one page — matching the page count the GOV-3477 cycle's own parent Form 220.00 VERIFICATION.md had already disclosed ("220.03 (treaty-exempt income) — image 178, 1 page"). The table's row count (1 printed grand-total row plus 16 individual entry rows) was confirmed two independent ways: a direct visual count across three zoomed vertical slices of the page, and a pixel-luminance row-boundary scan down the row-number column detecting a consistent ~23px row pitch from the grand-total row to the last entry row. No submission was made and no live kgd.gov.kz/cabinet.salyk.kz account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: iin
fields.label: ИИН
fields.description: The taxpayer's 12-digit Individual Identification Number (ИИН), the same identifier used on the main Form 220.00 declaration this schedule is attached to.

fields.name: taxPeriodYear
fields.label: Налоговый период, за который представляется налоговая отчетность: год
fields.description: The calendar year of the tax period for which this schedule is filed.

fields.name: currentSheetNumber
fields.label: Укажите номер текущего листа
fields.description: The sequential sheet number of this physical page, printed in a boxed header field distinct from the numbered Item 1/2 fields — used when a taxpayer's treaty-income entries exceed this schedule's single-sheet 16-row capacity and require additional continuation sheets of the same form.

fields.name: totalExemptIncome
fields.label: ИТОГО (строка заполняется ТОЛЬКО по итогу формы)
fields.description: Total income exempt from taxation under international treaties, summed across every entry row below — the form's own printed total row (row number fixed at 00000001), filled only with the grand total, not a per-treaty amount.

fields.name: entry1TreatyTypeCode
fields.label: Код вида международного договора
fields.description: Code identifying the type of international treaty for entry row 1 of this schedule's 16-row treaty-income table (column B). The form prints only the 2-digit boxed-code entry control; no legend of code values appears on the page.

fields.name: entry1TreatyName
fields.label: Наименование международного договора
fields.description: Name of the international treaty for entry row 1 (column C) — a free-text line, not a boxed-digit field.

fields.name: entry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны, с которой заключен международный договор
fields.description: Code of the country with which the treaty for entry row 1 was concluded (column D), a 3-digit boxed-code entry control.

fields.name: entry1ExemptIncomeAmount
fields.label: Доход, подлежащий освобождению от налогообложения
fields.description: Income exempt from taxation under the treaty named in entry row 1 (column E), in tenge.
